total_eur: 44
counterparty: 深圳市海云电子
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Foundry
lines:
  - item: ESP32-C3 dev boards
    quantity: 4
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 32
  - item: relay modules
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 6
    line_eur: 12
---

## Line Items


## Notes

Cheap experimental hardware order that sat in the drawer until House Mesh became a named cleanup lane.

next_step.current_state: All three Foundry-related bills were migrated to YAML frontmatter while preserving their bodies. Per inbox workflow, now remove the processed inbox item, then report completion.

function.message: Worked the oldest inbox message by OCR-migrating all Foundry-related bill records I found under 50_finance/purchases into YAML frontmatter, preserving each note body, then deleting the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read nested AGENTS.MD files before entering folders, inspected 99_system with tree, used process-next-inbox-item plus OCR/migration/schema docs, treated inbox as request not canonical truth, verified Foundry via the canonical entity file, preserved existing note bodies, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md requested OCR of all bills related to Foundry. Canonical identity for Foundry was verified in 10_entities/cast/foundry.md. A search in 50_finance/purchases found three matching bill records, and each read showed complete bill data sufficient for the finance frontmatter schema in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md. I added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to those three files and then deleted the inbox item as required by the inbox-processing workflows.
